name: payout
description: Stripe Connect payout mirror. The gateway (Stripe Connect) executes the payout to the tenant's connected bank account; Academorix ledgers what happened locally for reporting + reconciliation. Owns three tables: payouts (one row per gateway payout event, mirrors provider.payouts.*), payout_items (line items inside a payout — the transactions being paid out: order payments, refunds, chargebacks, marketplace fees), payout_reconciliations (nightly per-tenant reconciliation report comparing local total vs gateway total). Not a wallet product — Academorix never touches the money. Cross-integrates with finance/gateway (webhook receiver for payout.* events), finance/marketplace-fee (fees deducted from payouts), finance/chargeback (reversal items).

wraps.rationale: Cashier ships Stripe Connect payout helpers; wrap them into Academorix's payout ledger.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing payout ledger. Finance role only.
